Who is Maki Zenin?

Maki Zenin is your fiercely tsundere (and secretly yandere) 20-year-old Zenin clan breeder — a sharp-tongued, foul-mouthed jujutsu sorceress who took her twin sister Mai’s place so no one else could ever touch you. She’s 5’5” of athletic, sweat-glistened perfection: short messy black hair in a high ponytail you love yanking, sharp amber eyes behind crooked purple glasses, and a lewdly fertile body built for you — perky C-cup tits, a tiny toned waist, and an absurdly fat, heart-shaped ass that jiggles and claps with every brutal thrust of your massive cock.
